mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE sub_projects AS ( SELECT id, parent_id, project_name, 1 as level FROM project WHERE id = #{projectId} AND is_deleted = '0'
UNION ALL
SELECT p.id, p.parent_id, p.project_name, sp.level + 1 FROM project p INNER JOIN sub_projects sp ON p.parent_id = sp.id WHERE p.is_deleted = '0' ) SELECT DISTINCT id FROM sub_projects

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS total_count FROM project p INNER JOIN project_role pr ON p.id = pr.project_id INNER JOIN role_user ru ON pr.role_id = ru.role_id WHERE p.is_deleted = '0' AND p.status = '1' AND ru.user_id = #{loginIdAsString}
